name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour once, then measure and add baking powder, salt, and granulated sugar, sifting together three times.
2. Add softened butter to the dry ingredients.
3. In a separate bowl, combine egg, milk, and vanilla.
4. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture, stirring until all flour is dampened.
5. Beat vigorously for 1 minute.
6. Melt 4 tablespoons of butter in an 8x8x2-inch pan or 8-inch skillet over low flame.
7. Add brown sugar and cook and stir until thoroughly mixed.
8. Arrange pineapple wedges on top of the caramel mixture.
9. Sprinkle pecans over the top.
10. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
11. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 50 minutes, or until done.
12. Loosen cake from sides of pan using a spatula.
13. Turn the cake upside down onto a serving dish with pineapple on top.
14. Garnish with whipped cream if desired. Other fruits may be substituted for pineapple and pecans in this recipe, including sliced apples, sliced peaches, cooked apricots or prunes, or canned or fresh cherries, seeded.
